text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's still time today to do some more training.
I ask the students gathered on the racetrack what
they'd like to do.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I want to do some partner running! Prez is
here too, so there's no better chance to run with
her!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm feeling good today, so I want to use this
opportunity to hone my running technique as
much as possible!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Physical activity is good, but how about
looking to the wisdom of the racing greats? By
reading of their deeds, we can heighten our
collective knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As a matter of fact, I heard that a new manual has
been added to the library's collection.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the proposals sound good to me. If I were to
choose something we could all do together,
though...
choice_data_list: Let's read up on how to improve our running.
A good, solid run is the way to go!
We ought to polish our technique until it shines!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Then it's decided. Everyone, go get changed.
We'll meet outside after. Make sure to stay warm,
all right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let us read our way to greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now that's what I'm talking about! Running's more
fun when you have company!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! What are we waiting for? You'd better get
a move on if you want to beat me, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I don't know how long this healthy streak will
last, so I want to make it count!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I'm going to put everything I've got into—cough, cough! Sorry about that! I mean, I'll give it my all while making sure I don't overdo it!
